description_long: This is a robust, military-style toolbox with a dark green, hard plastic exterior and reinforced corners for durability. The box features a rectangular shape with molded ridges on the lid and sides, providing structural strength and a rugged appearance. One of the toolboxes is shown open, revealing a spacious, single-compartment interior lined with a dark, ribbed material, likely for added protection of contents. The exterior displays integrated handles on the shorter sides for easy carrying, and the lid is attached with sturdy hinges. There are visible latch mechanisms on the front for secure closure, and a small, rectangular label or logo plate is present on the lid. The surface shows signs of wear, with scuffed edges and a slightly glossy finish.
description: A rugged, dark green military-style toolbox with reinforced corners, integrated handles, and secure latches. The box features a single large compartment and a slightly glossy, worn exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing two toolboxes, one closed and one open, revealing the spacious interior and the front latch mechanisms.
description_view_1: Angled top-rear view highlighting the molded ridges on the lid and the integrated side handles.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying the solid, reinforced back and the box's overall rectangular form.
description_view_3: Angled rear view with the lid open, showing the interior compartment and the robust hinge design.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, integrated side handles made of molded plastic, fixed and recessed for ergonomic grip.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Front-mounted clasp latches made of metal, designed for secure closure, with no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular label or logo plate is visible on the lid, centered near the front edge, with white text or symbols.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment with no visible trays or dividers; interior appears lined with a ribbed protective material.
attribute_external_labeling: Rectangular label or logo plate on the lid, centered near the front edge, with white text or symbols.
